description: Tracks active open-source AI agent repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: Free, local, open-source 24/7 Cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more | 🌟 Star if you like it!

OpenSandbox is a general-purpose sandbox platform for AI applications, offering multi-language SDKs, unified sandbox APIs, and Docker/Kubernetes runtimes for scenarios like Coding Agents, GUI Agents, Agent Evaluation, AI Code Execution, and RL Training.

Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
🦞 OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot) 汉化版 - 开源个人 AI 助手中文版 | Claude/ChatGPT LLM 接入 | WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord 多平台 | 每小时自动同步 | CLI + Dashboard 全中文 | 全流程搭建教程，以及排错指南！
AI generates editable, beautifully designed PPTX from any document — no design skills needed    | 15 examples, 229 pages
the easiest way to run natural language-described workflows automatically
First AI Journey for DevOps - with comprehensive learning paths, practical tips, and enterprise guidelines

A curated list of OpenClaw resources, tools, skills, tutorials & articles. OpenClaw (formerly Moltbot / Clawdbot) — open-source self-hosted AI agent for WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord & 50+ integrations.
The ultimate setup harness for OpenClaw. Deploy in minutes. Stay running for months. No CLI required.
Open Cowork - Opensource Claude Cowork for Windows & macOS.
Turn any web app into an API. Chrome extension captures browser traffic, auto-generates schemas, lets AI replay APIs directly. No official API needed.
Collection of templates using the Alchemyst AI Platform for your next big AI app.
Infrastructure for building a supervised, self-improving agent organization. Run Claude Code from Feishu & Telegram with shared memory, agent factory, task scheduling, and an agent communication bus.
OS-level autonomous AI agent with long-term memory, multi-agent coordination, Titan Chronos scheduler & Moltbot Social Core
